items.title: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
items.summary: Cuba's current president says the charges against Castro - including conspiracy to kill US nationals and destruction of aircraft - are a "political manoeuvre".

items.title: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
items.summary: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.

items.title: DR Congo cancels World Cup training camp over Ebola outbreak
items.summary: The outbreak, caused by a rare Ebola species, is thought to have caused 139 deaths so far.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 泰國公主帕差拉吉蒂雅帕住院逾3年 王室證實病情惡化

items.title: 日本議員上畠寛弘「大變身」！ 10年前模樣曝光網喊︰難怪被海關擋
items.summary: 現年38歲的日本神戶市議員上畠寛弘，曾分享自己訪台時，因減重後的體態和外貌，與護照片相差甚遠，被台灣海關當場攔下嚴格檢查，趣聞讓台日民眾津津樂道。昨（20日）上畠寛弘曬出一組照片...…
